subject: Re: revised alex 2
body:
--- jeffrey epstein <littlestjeff@yahoo.com> wrote:

> I am sending you this letter,   in response to the
> serious concern you had  raised at our meeting,
regarding  alleged
> improper investigative conduct.As I told you neither
I nor my client would tolerate any such conduct on the
part of our investigators.  With that unbreakable rule
in mind , I
> immediately began an inquiry of our 
> staff, and believe that the  contemporaneous notes
> taken by our investigator, while attempting to
> interview  Alexandra Hall, will provide the
> necessary
> explanation for your thoroughly justified ,
> consternation.. IT also provides 
> a
> more troublesome, telling and ,unfortunately all too
common,
> illustration  of her character.. At our meeting ,I
also suggested the existence of her web site, and I am
also enclosing   some examples. You will note that
she,  herself has
> chosen to go by the  nickname of ,"pimp
> juice". and details her apparent fascination with
marijuana,,
> This will come as no surprise to you as I'm sure you
> are already  aware of her recent  palm beach arrest
> for possession.  The following raw  notes, were
> taken
> by investigators (one who suffers from a distinct
> speech impediment , making  therefore ,a totally
innocent, claim of impersonation virtually
> impossible}who have  many years experience in
> conducting interviews, who are also well versed in
> the
> law , and  extremely sensitive to any potential
> allegations of wrongdoing. They were instructed to
> take her statement verbatim ,because we feared that 
 Alexandra , an
> accomplished drama student, might try  to
>  mislead them ,as
> sucessfully
> as she has misled others....they were instructed to
> ask  detailed . questions  to further elucidate, her
> previous pronouncements  regarding the no holds
> barred
> ,extreme lengths she would  go to, ,as she put
> it,"to
> be  rich,,no I mean really,really rich". Even though
> they were both well  prepared,and seasoned
> investigators,   They were quite shocked at the 
> overwhelming, non-stop  barrage  of profanity, being
> hurled at them at a furious pace and volume, from
> what
> initially appeared to be simply a young woman of
> slight build and demeanor. Read for yourself...     
>  
>    insert transcript.   ....Our  other but, much
> less
> likely alternative source, for the potential
> misunderstanding,we beleive could be a close friend
> of
> miss Hall's ,named ,Ashley Davis, who goes by the
> more
> outlandish self chosen moniker and complete web name
> of "Ashley Fucking Davis, "whose web pages I also
> enclose.  I trust    this information provided in
this letter  is helpful to
> you , as we all try       to bring this difficult
> period to a close...                                
>  
>              In the event that the source of the
allegation , is neither of the two girls mentioned
above, if you could provide us with the name of the
person,or persons, we will check with the relevant
investigators, and continue until we are satisfied
that we have gotten to the bottom of this matter.     
    
> 
> 
> 
> 
> 
> 	
> 		
> __________________________________ 
> Yahoo! for Good - Make a difference this year. 
> http://brand.yahoo.com/cybergivingweek2005/
>

body_html:
--- jeffrey epstein littlestjeff@yahoo.com wrote:

I am sending you this letter, in response to the
serious concern you had raised at our meeting,
regarding alleged
improper investigative conduct.As I told you neither
I nor my client would tolerate any such conduct on the
part of our investigators. With that unbreakable rule
in mind , I
immediately began an inquiry of our
staff, and believe that the contemporaneous notes
taken by our investigator, while attempting to
interview Alexandra Hall, will provide the
necessary
explanation for your thoroughly justified ,
consternation.. IT also provides
a
more troublesome, telling and ,unfortunately all too
common,
illustration of her character.. At our meeting ,I
also suggested the existence of her web site, and I am
also enclosing some examples. You will note that
she, herself has
chosen to go by the nickname of ,"pimp
juice". and details her apparent fascination with
marijuana,,
This will come as no surprise to you as I'm sure you
are already aware of her recent palm beach arrest
for possession. The following raw notes, were
taken
by investigators (one who suffers from a distinct
speech impediment , making therefore ,a totally
innocent, claim of impersonation virtually
impossible}who have many years experience in
conducting interviews, who are also well versed in
the
law , and extremely sensitive to any potential
allegations of wrongdoing. They were instructed to
take her statement verbatim ,because we feared that
Alexandra , an
accomplished drama student, might try to
mislead them ,as
sucessfully
as she has misled others....they were instructed to
ask detailed . questions to further elucidate, her
previous pronouncements regarding the no holds
barred
,extreme lengths she would go to, ,as she put
it,"to
be rich,,no I mean really,really rich". Even though
they were both well prepared,and seasoned
investigators, They were quite shocked at the
overwhelming, non-stop barrage of profanity, being
hurled at them at a furious pace and volume, from
what
initially appeared to be simply a young woman of
slight build and demeanor. Read for yourself...

insert transcript. ....Our other but, much
less
likely alternative source, for the potential
misunderstanding,we beleive could be a close friend
of
miss Hall's ,named ,Ashley Davis, who goes by the
more
outlandish self chosen moniker and complete web name
of "Ashley Fucking Davis, "whose web pages I also
enclose. I trust this information provided in
this letter is helpful to
you , as we all try to bring this difficult
period to a close... 

         In the event that the source of the

allegation , is neither of the two girls mentioned
above, if you could provide us with the name of the
person,or persons, we will check with the relevant
investigators, and continue until we are satisfied
that we have gotten to the bottom of this matter.
